subject: [PATCH 3/8] mm/zsmalloc: Introduce objcgs pointer in struct zpdesc

reviews.author: Joshua Hahn
reviews.summary: Reviewer raised concerns about the complexity of subzpdesc swap ins/outs and cross-boundary cases, but ultimately agreed that storing objcgs in zspage struct makes more sense. Suggested a different approach to simplify migration pathways.

2026-03-06.patch_summary: Introduction of objcgs pointer in struct zpdesc for mm/zsmalloc
